text:
### CHAPTER 8 E+W APPLICATIONS FOR ORDERS PREVENTING AVOIDANCE UNDER SECTION 32L OF THE CHILD SUPPORT ACT 1991


### Scope of this Chapter E+W


8.35. Subject to rule 8.40, the rules in this Chapter apply to applications made under section 32L (1) and (2) of the 1991 Act M9 .


Marginal Citations


M9 Section 32L was inserted by section 24 of the Child Maintenance and Other Payments Act 2008 (c.6) .


### Interpretation E+W


8.36. In this Chapter—


“ child support maintenance ” has the meaning assigned to it in section 3(6) of the 1991 Act M10 ;


“ reviewable disposition ” has the meaning assigned to it in section 32L(5) of the 1991 Act.


Marginal Citations


M10 Section 3(6) was amended by section 1(2) of the Child Support, Pensions and Social Security Act 2000.


### Where to start proceedings E+W


F15 8.37. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .


Textual Amendments


F15 Rule 8.37 omitted (22.4.2014) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 22 (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2


### Who the parties are E+W


8.38. —(1) The applicant to the proceedings is the [ F16 Secretary of State ] and the respondent is the person who has failed to pay child support maintenance.


(2) The court may at any time direct that —


Textual Amendments


F16 Words in rule 8.38(1) substituted (1.8.2012) by The Public Bodies (Child Maintenance and Enforcement Commission: Abolition and Transfer of Functions) Order 2012 (S.I. 2012/2007) , art. 1(2) , Sch. para. 125(b)
